use_cases: Select date ranges for filtering data tables or reports
Schedule appointments by picking start and end dates
Filter products or listings by availability dates
Set date parameters for analytics dashboards
ai_summary: A dropdown-based date range picker component from Ruixen.UI featuring a button with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for styling, and includes shadow effects and rounded corners. Designed for selecting date ranges in forms and filtering interfaces across various industry applications.
